generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HokuyoPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for visual data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IntelDeepsenseVisualDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed sensor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance HokuyoPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance IntelDeepsenseVisualDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance ObjectTracksDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, PointCloudClusteringModel
]

instance HokuyoPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringModel
]

instance IntelDeepsenseVisualData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Visual data from Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IntelDeepsenseVisualDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationService
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabaseEnabler
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabaseEnabler
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object tracks processed from LiDAR point clouds via DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTracksDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringService, VisualizationService
]

instance PointCloudClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking model using DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filter"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance ACCModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACC model compliant with ISO 15622 Class I"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CPlusPlus
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for component integration"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, VisualizationService, ReportGenerationService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration"
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudClusteringModel, ACCModel
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for scripting and processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, VisualizationService
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for high-performance components"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCModel
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudClusteringModel
]

instance SQLDatabaseEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for storage of vehicle state and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ReportGenerationService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data monitoring (real-time display, saving, and reporting of vehicle state)"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight, VehicleStateSavingAction, SystemPerformanceReportInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computation offloading (ACC logic executed remotely)"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCDecisionLogicInsight, ACCComputationAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote management (UI for command issuance)"
    DTDFVocab:provides CommandIssuanceAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization of environment"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Report generation for system diagnostics"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemPerformanceReportInsight
]

instance TwinningProcessService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Evaluative case study using ISO 23247 RA as foundation; requirements defined via case-based generalization; implemented with ROS2 packages; public artifacts for reuse; ongoing refinement of architecture"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemArchitectureRefinementInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of object tracks, vehicle state, and projected path"
]

instance ACCDecisionLogicInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "ACC decision logic (desired speed calculation) displayed for transparency"
]

instance SystemPerformanceReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Reports generated for system performance analysis"
]

instance SystemArchitectureRefinementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Ongoing refinement of digital twin architecture"
]

instance VehicleStateSavingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Saving vehicle state data to SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ACCComputationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Computation offloading of ACC logic for desired speed calculation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CommandIssuanceAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "UI for command issuance to vehicle actuators"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuation converting desired speed to voltage commands"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuation"
]

instance JetsonNXComputer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson NX microcomputer for processing"
]

instance OrinNanoComputer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Orin Nano microcomputer for processing"
]

instance VedderESC : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for motor control"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity on vehicle (Jetson)"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity cloud-hosted"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Entity separate machine"
]

instance CrossSystemEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cross-System Entity for data translation"
]

instance AutonomousVehicleSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "1/10-scale autonomous vehicle built from Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium teleoperated vehicle retrofitted with NVIDIA Jetson NX and Orin Nano microcomputers, Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR, Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera, and Vedder Electronic Speed Controller"
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, MotorActuator, SteeringServoActuator, JetsonNXComputer, OrinNanoComputer, VedderESC, PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity, CrossSystemEntity
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "ACC system computes desired speed based on lead vehicle distance and sends motor voltage commands and steering commands; remote commands for emergency braking, ACC enable/disable, and desired speed modification."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with end-to-end latency ≤100 ms (per 3GPP TS 22.185) and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms for event ordering and coordination."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated entities: Physical Twin Entity (sensors, actuators), Digital Twin Entity (ACC, data processing), User Entity (visualization, control panel), Cross-System Entity (Data Translation FE), with ROS2-based intra-entity and Wi-Fi inter-entity communication."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design phase (cyber-physical experimentation, compliance validation) and operational phase (real-time monitoring, optimization, health monitoring)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "ACC implementation adheres to ISO 15622 Class I specifications; latency and clock sync requirements (100 ms) ensure safety-critical operation; no explicit V&V beyond compliance with standards."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 network for intra-component communication, Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication; Data Translation FE handles serialization, message alignment, and unit conversions; latency ≤100 ms and clock sync 100 ms."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity on vehicle-mounted Jetson NX/Orin Nano; Digital Twin Entity potentially cloud-hosted for computation offloading; User Entity on separate machine; cross-system components deployed as needed."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for DT structure; ISO 15622 for ACC system functionality; 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2V communication latency requirements."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical system with requirements for end-to-end latency ≤100 ms and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms to ensure operational safety; specific cybersecurity measures not detailed in document."
]
